validator_must_detect: form id 'cli-tool' contains 'cli'; the only valid [interface] variant is 'subcommands'
comment: Schema's oneOf accepts 'endpoints' as a structurally valid variant when present alone; the form↔variant tiebreak (top-to-bottom, first match wins per spec §7.2) is enforced by the validator. anatomy-spec's harness only checks shape; this fixture documents the boundary for the validator's conformance suite.
